The first step towards real trust.

How many times did you want to share the future of Web3 with someone you love?

5 verified contracts. 717+ on-chain transactions. 85.7% claim rate.

theOpportunity.title: The Opportunity
theOpportunity.description:
Your invitation to the future.

We are early. The infrastructure is ready. The community is forming.

hero.subtitle: The all-in-one platform for independent car sellers. Get your own professional website, AI sales assistant, CRM, and multi-channel communication — all under your brand.

problem.title: Selling Cars Shouldn't Be This Hard
problem.problem1: Managing leads across WhatsApp, calls, and emails manually wastes hours daily
problem.problem2: No professional online presence — clients can't find you or trust you easily
problem.problem3: Repetitive tasks (follow-ups, appointments, reminders) drain your selling time
problem.problem4: No data insights — you're flying blind without knowing what works
problem.solution1: AI assistant handles initial client conversations 24/7 in your style
problem.solution2: Your own professional website at yourname.autosmall.com
problem.solution3: Automated CRM tracks every lead from first contact to closed sale
problem.solution4: Real-time analytics show your best channels, hottest leads, and conversion rates

howItWorks.title: Start Selling Smarter in 3 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From signup to your first AI-assisted sale. Simple and fast.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up, add your info and inventory. Your professional page goes live instantly at yourname.autosmall.com
howItWorks.step2Desc: Add your vehicles with photos, specs, and pricing. Our AI optimizes your listings for maximum visibility.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your AI assistant handles client inquiries, schedules appointments, and qualifies leads while you focus on closing deals.

features.title: Everything You Need to Sell More
features.subtitle: Professional tools designed specifically for independent car sellers.
features.f1Desc: Your 24/7 virtual assistant that chats with clients, answers questions, and qualifies leads in your voice and style.
features.f2Desc: Manage WhatsApp, calls, emails, and social media conversations from one unified inbox.
features.f3Desc: Your own branded page at yourname.autosmall.com with your inventory, contact info, and client reviews.
features.f4Desc: Real-time dashboards showing lead sources, conversion rates, response times, and revenue tracking.
features.f5Desc: Grow your network by referring other sellers. Earn commissions on every sale in your network.
features.f6Desc: Bank-grade encryption, secure data handling, and GDPR compliance to protect you and your clients.

brand.name: Autos MALL
brand.description: The AI-powered platform that transforms how independent sellers manage their car business. From lead generation to closing deals.
brand.copyright: Autos MALL LLC. All rights reserved.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Complete technical documentation of the CryptoGift Wallets DAO ecosystem

hero.description: We are a decentralized autonomous organization dedicated to making Web3 accessible through emotional experiences and artistic gifts.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: Democratize access to Web3 through a system where completing educational quests generates governance tokens, turning learning effort into voice and vote in the protocol's future.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To become the premier gateway for Web3 onboarding, where every new member starts their journey through meaningful, emotional experiences that transform complex technology into beautiful gifts.

emotional.title: Emotional Onboarding
emotional.description: We believe the first experience with Web3 should be emotional, not technical. Our NFT-wallets feel like gifts, not complex software.

artistic.title: Artistic Gifts
artistic.description: Every interaction is designed with artistic intention. From custom avatars to personalized experiences, beauty guides our creation.

community.title: DAO Community
community.description: Governed entirely by our community. 1 CGC = 1 Vote. Your participation shapes the future of CryptoGift.

laboratory.title: The Laboratory
laboratory.description: A factory of useful products. Dozens of tools in continuous development that will complete the ecosystem into something extraordinary.

competitions.title: Competitions
competitions.description: 32 models that will be incorporated into the system, transforming everyday life: tournaments, challenges, milestones, rankings, pools and more. Compete, have fun, earn.

team.title: Top Contributors
team.subtitle: The visionaries building the future of Web3 gifting

executive.title: Executive Summary
executive.content: CryptoGift Wallets DAO solves Web3's #1 problem: adoption. 73% of people say crypto is 'too complicated'. We flip the script with NFT-wallets that feel like gifts, not tech. 104 days beta, 85.7% claim rate, 0 critical bugs. Built on Base (Ethereum L2). Learn → Earn → Govern.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: From zero to Web3—together. Learn. Earn. Co-govern.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: Democratize access to Web3 through a system where completing educational quests generates governance tokens, turning learning effort into voice and vote in the protocol's future.

barriersList.complexity: Technical complexity: The blockchain learning curve intimidates new users
barriersList.incentives: Lack of incentives: Traditional education doesn't reward progress
barriersList.disconnection: Governance-community disconnection: Protocols governed by early adopters with capital
barriersList.noPath: No clear path: No structured route from beginner to contributor

limitationsList.airdrop: Airdrop farming: Mercenary behavior without real commitment
limitationsList.voteBuying: Vote buying: Power concentration in whales
limitationsList.superficial: Superficial participation: Users voting without understanding proposals
limitationsList.disconnectedEdu: Disconnected education: Courses that don't lead to active participation

solution.title: The Solution: CryptoGift Wallets DAO
solution.flow: User → Quest Completed → EAS Attestation → MilestoneEscrow → CGC Tokens → Governance Power

token.title: Governance Token (CGC)
token.name: Name: CryptoGift Coin
token.type: Type: Pure Governance Token (no economic rights)

distribution.title: Initial Distribution (2M CGC)
distribution.referralsDesc: Multi-level referral rewards and signup bonuses
distribution.educationalDesc: Quest completion, academy tasks, learning achievements
distribution.treasuryDesc: Controlled by governance for protocol development

utility.title: Token Utility
utility.governance: Governance: 1 CGC = 1 Vote. Create proposals, vote on treasury allocation, delegate power
utility.access: Earning: Complete tasks (50-500 CGC), refer friends (10-20%), unlock premium features
utility.boosts: Status: Higher holdings = priority access, exclusive channels, founding member perks

contracts.title: Smart Contracts
contracts.subtitle: All contracts deployed and verified on Base Mainnet (Dec 2025)

cgcToken.title: CGC Token (ERC20Votes)
cgcToken.desc: Governance token with voting power delegation. Owned by Aragon DAO via TimelockController

aragonDAO.title: Aragon DAO
aragonDAO.desc: Decentralized governance with Token Voting plugin. Controls TimelockController

timelockController.title: TimelockController
timelockController.desc: 7-day delay for CGC token owner operations. Prevents immediate malicious changes

minterGateway.title: MinterGateway v3.3
minterGateway.desc: Primary minting mechanism with 20M supply cap. Requires authorized caller approval

milestoneEscrow.title: MilestoneEscrow
milestoneEscrow.desc: Task reward distribution with EIP-712 verification. Transfers from treasury (no minting)

masterController.title: MasterEIP712Controller
masterController.desc: Centralized authorization control for all system permissions

taskRules.title: TaskRulesEIP712
taskRules.desc: Task validation rules and completion verification logic

ownership.title: Governance & Ownership Model
ownership.description: CGC Token ownership follows a secure governance chain: Aragon DAO controls the TimelockController, which owns the CGC Token. This ensures all owner operations have a 7-day delay for community review.
ownership.flow: Aragon DAO → TimelockController (7-day delay) → CGC Token Owner → MinterGateway (authorized caller)

proposalTypes.title: Proposal Types
proposalTypes.tokenRelease: Token Release: Distribution of rewards via MilestoneEscrow
proposalTypes.paramChanges: Parameter Changes: Adjustment of caps, limits, multipliers
proposalTypes.treasury: Treasury Management: Use of DAO funds

votingParams.title: Voting Parameters
votingParams.participation: Minimum Participation: 10% of total supply (200,000 CGC)

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This documentation is a living document that evolves with community feedback. CGC tokens are pure governance tokens and DO NOT constitute securities nor grant economic or financial rights. There is no 'revenue sharing' associated with the CGC token. The token grants exclusively governance rights and access to protocol features. Participate at your own risk.

coingecko.title: CoinGecko Listing Information
coingecko.previousRequest: Application submitted Sept 11, 2025 (Request ID: CL1009250007) - Rejected
coingecko.rejectionReason: Reason: No liquidity pool found on DEX
coingecko.rejectionReasonValue: No liquidity pool found on DEX
coingecko.step1: Create minimal liquidity pool on Uniswap Base ($100-200 USDC)
coingecko.step2: Re-apply to CoinGecko with pool information

api.title: API Endpoints
api.subtitle: For CoinGecko integration
api.note: Both APIs return numeric values in CGC units (no decimals)

fraudWarning.title: Why Your Wallet Shows a Warning (and why that's actually good news)
fraudWarning.problemDesc: MetaMask/Coinbase may flag CGC transfers. This is normal for new tokens.
fraudWarning.reasonDesc: We're pre-listing. Once CoinGecko approves us (application submitted), warnings disappear.
fraudWarning.reason1: New tokens without CoinGecko listing trigger automatic warnings
fraudWarning.reason2: This is a standard security feature, not a problem with CGC
fraudWarning.impactDesc: You're early. Founding members who join before listing get the same tokens—just with an extra verification step.
fraudWarning.resolutionDesc: CoinGecko listing expected in 2-6 weeks. Your tokens are 100% real, verified on BaseScan.
fraudWarning.solutionDesc: CoinGecko listing is expected in 2-6 weeks. Once listed, warnings will automatically disappear from all wallets.
fraudWarning.safetyDesc: CGC is verified on BaseScan with open source code. Your tokens are real, secure, and will be recognized by all platforms after CoinGecko listing.

discordWarning.title: ⚠️ Important before continuing
discordWarning.emailRequired: Discord requires your email to be verified to authorize external apps.
discordWarning.instructions: If you haven't verified your Discord email, you'll see an error and won't be able to continue. Verify your email first in Discord → Settings → My Account.
discordWarning.wrongAccount: Wrong account? Use a different Discord account
discordWarning.verificationNeededDesc: Discord needs you to verify your account to protect your security
discordWarning.whyDiscordAsks: Why does Discord ask for this?
discordWarning.whyExplanation: Discord blocks access to external apps for unverified accounts. It's a security measure that protects you against account theft and spam. It only takes 2 minutes to verify!
discordWarning.benefitSecurity: Security: Protects your account from unauthorized access
discordWarning.benefitRecovery: Recovery: You can recover your account if you forget your password
discordWarning.benefitFullAccess: Full access: Use Discord in any app and community
discordWarning.benefitTrust: Trust: Serious servers only accept verified accounts
discordWarning.howToVerify: How do I verify my account? (2 minutes)
discordWarning.step1: Open Discord on your computer or phone
discordWarning.spamTip: Tip: If you can't find the email, check your spam folder. You can also verify with your phone number.

socialEngagement.title: Earn {amount} CGC!
socialEngagement.earnReward: {action} us on {platform} and earn {amount} CGC instantly!
socialEngagement.termsNote: Reward is claimed once per account. Must have verified social account.
socialEngagement.didYouFollow: Did you follow us on Twitter/X?
socialEngagement.confirmToEarn: Confirm to claim your {amount} CGC reward
socialEngagement.rewardEarned: You have earned {amount} CGC for your engagement!
socialEngagement.alreadyClaimedMessage: You have already claimed this {platform} engagement reward.
socialEngagement.claimError: Failed to claim reward. Please try again.
socialEngagement.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.

toasts.connectWalletDesc: You need to connect your wallet to vote on proposals

errors.connectWalletDesc: You need to connect your wallet to vote

discordWarning.title: Important: Discord Verification Required
discordWarning.emailRequired: Discord requires your account to have a verified email before authorizing third-party apps.
discordWarning.instructions: If you haven't verified your email, you'll need to do so in Discord Settings → My Account → Email.
discordWarning.wrongAccount: Wrong account? Use a different one
discordWarning.verificationNeededDesc: Your Discord account needs email verification before you can authorize apps.
discordWarning.whyExplanation: Discord requires email verification to protect users and prevent spam. This is a Discord security policy, not ours.
discordWarning.benefitRecovery: You can recover your account if needed
discordWarning.benefitFullAccess: Full access to all Discord features
discordWarning.benefitTrust: Access to exclusive communities like ours
discordWarning.step4: Under Email, click "Verify" or add your email
discordWarning.step5: Check your inbox and click the verification link
discordWarning.spamTip: Check your spam/junk folder if you don't see the email!

why.title: Why Autos MALL?
why.subtitle: We make buying a car feel like it should — simple, transparent, and enjoyable.
why.inspectedDesc: Every vehicle goes through a thorough multi-point inspection before listing.
why.transparentDesc: No hidden fees, no surprises. The price you see is the price you pay.
why.financingDesc: Flexible payment plans to fit your budget. Get pre-approved in minutes.
why.supportDesc: Real humans who care. We're with you from first click to first drive.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from real people
testimonials.t1Text: I was nervous about buying a car online, but the team at Autos MALL made it so easy. Found my dream SUV in 10 minutes!
testimonials.t2Text: The financing process was incredibly smooth. Got approved the same day and drove home in my new truck.
testimonials.t3Text: Best car buying experience I've ever had. Transparent, fast, and the car was exactly as described.
